name: global translation source coverage
summary: Global translation source coverage gate passed: audited web/mobile JSX text, labels, placeholders, titles, hidden controls, and accessibility copy are registered in dedicated translation JSON.

name: translation trust
summary: Translation completion trust gate passed: prominent Hindi/Gujarati UI copy uses native script, has no empty values, and avoids known mixed-language trust leaks.

name: localization architecture
summary: Localization architecture gate passed: production source has no hardcoded Hindi/Gujarati script, native copy is JSON-backed, and translation JSON imports stay behind dedicated adapters.

name: native script chat
summary: Native-script Predicta chat language checks passed.

name: pre-live localization sweep
summary: Pre-live Phase 9 localization sweep gate passed: audited user-facing surfaces use translation JSON/adapters, native copy has no mixed-language leaks, checkout/pricing/report/PDF labels are JSON-backed, and source has no hardcoded Indic UI strings.

name: graha names localization
summary: Graha name localization gate passed: English, Hindi, and Gujarati planet display names are locked.

name: Jaimini localization
summary: PREDICTA_JAIMINI_PHASE_10_LOCALIZATION_AND_TRANSLATION_REBUILD passed: Jaimini localization, stale Nadi copy removal, and hardcoded-copy guards are green.

name: Kundli Karma translation accessibility
summary: PREDICTA_KUNDLI_KARMA_PHASE_13_TRANSLATION_ACCESSIBILITY_AND_NO_HARDCODED_COPY_SWEEP passed: Kundli Karma translations, accessibility markers, chat language handoff, and no-hardcoded-copy sweep are green.

name: monetization localization trust
summary: Monetization Phase 10 localization/trust gate passed: paid-flow copy is JSON-backed, English/Hindi/Gujarati entries are complete, hardcoded monetization phrases are absent from audited surfaces, and trust copy avoids fear/unlimited claims.
